139	class FusedMoE(torch.nn.Module):
140	    """FusedMoE layer for MoE models.
141	
142	    This layer contains both MergedColumnParallel weights (gate_up_proj /
143	    w13) and RowParallelLinear weights (down_proj/ w2).
144	
145	    Note: Mixtral uses w1, w2, and w3 for gate, up, and down_proj. We
146	    copy that naming convention here and handle any remapping in the
147	    load_weights function in each model implementation.
148	
149	    Args:
150	        num_experts: Number of experts in the model
151	        top_k: Number of experts selected for each token
152	        hidden_size: Input hidden state size of the transformer
153	        intermediate_size: Intermediate size of the experts
154	        params_dtype: Data type for the parameters.
155	        reduce_results: Whether to apply all_reduce on the output of the layer
156	        quant_config: Quantization configuration.
157	        inplace: suggestion to compute inplace (modify input activation).
158	    """
159	
160	    def __init__(
161	        self,
162	        num_experts: int,
163	        hidden_size: int,
164	        intermediate_size: int,
165	        layer_id: int,
166	        top_k: Optional[int] = None,
167	        num_fused_shared_experts: int = 0,
168	        params_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,
169	        reduce_results: bool = False,
170	        quant_config: Optional[QuantizationConfig] = None,
171	        prefix: str = "",
172	        activation: str = "silu",
173	        apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,
174	        use_presharded_weights: bool = False,
175	        inplace: bool = True,
176	        no_combine: bool = False,
177	        routed_scaling_factor: Optional[float] = None,
178	        gemm1_alpha: Optional[float] = None,
179	        gemm1_clamp_limit: Optional[float] = None,
180	        swiglu_limit: Optional[float] = None,
181	        use_weight_loader_fused: bool = False,
182	        with_bias=False,
183	        routing_method_type: Optional[RoutingMethodType] = None,
184	        is_gated: bool = True,
185	        gate_up_interleaved: bool = True,
186	    ):
187	        super().__init__()
188	        if params_dtype is None:
189	            params_dtype = torch.get_default_dtype()
190	
191	        self.layer_id = layer_id
192	        self.top_k = top_k
193	        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
194	        self.num_experts = num_experts
195	        self.num_fused_shared_experts = num_fused_shared_experts
196	
197	        self.enable_flashinfer_cutlass_moe = (
198	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
199	        )
200	        self.moe_ep_size = get_parallel().moe_ep_size
201	        self.moe_ep_rank = get_parallel().moe_ep_rank
202	        self.moe_tp_size = get_parallel().moe_tp_size
203	        self.moe_tp_rank = get_parallel().moe_tp_rank
204	
205	        # For fused shared experts, DeepEP-class and MegaMOE backends use
206	        # per-rank physical shared slots, while other backends keep fused
207	        # shared experts as global shared slots. When fusion is disabled,
208	        # num_fused_shared_experts is 0 and no shared slots are added here.
209	        if has_per_rank_fused_shared_slots(num_fused_shared_experts):
210	            num_shared_slots = num_fused_shared_experts * self.moe_ep_size
211	        else:
212	            num_shared_slots = num_fused_shared_experts
213	
214	        assert (num_experts - num_shared_slots) % self.moe_ep_size == 0
215	        self._num_global_routed = num_experts - num_shared_slots
216	        self._num_local_routed = self._num_global_routed // self.moe_ep_size
217	        self.num_local_experts = self._num_local_routed + num_fused_shared_experts
218	        self._has_fused_shared = num_fused_shared_experts > 0
219	        self._pending_fp8_shared_weights: dict[tuple[int, str], torch.Tensor] = {}
220	        self._pending_fp8_shared_scales: dict[tuple[int, str], torch.Tensor] = {}
221	
222	        assert intermediate_size % self.moe_tp_size == 0
223	        self.intermediate_size_per_partition = intermediate_size // self.moe_tp_size
224	        self.reduce_results = reduce_results
225	        self.use_presharded_weights = use_presharded_weights
226	
227	        self.use_triton_kernels = get_moe_runner_backend().is_triton_kernels()
228	
229	        self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe = (
230	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
231	            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
232	        )
233	        self.use_deep_gemm = get_moe_runner_backend().is_deep_gemm()
234	
235	        # flashinfer_trtllm kernel requires intermediate_size to be a multiple of 128
236	        # Pad the intermediate_size_per_partition if necessary
237	        if (
238	            self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe
239	            and self.intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 != 0
240	        ):
241	            self.intermediate_size_per_partition = round_up(
242	                self.intermediate_size_per_partition, 128
243	            )
244	
245	        self.quant_config = quant_config
246	        self.use_flashinfer_mxfp4_moe = get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_mxfp4()
247	        # TODO maybe we should remove this `if`, since `Mxfp4MoEMethod` does another round-up logic
248	        if (
249	            self.quant_config is not None
250	            and self.quant_config.get_name() == "mxfp4"
251	            and self.use_flashinfer_mxfp4_moe
252	        ):
253	            hidden_size = round_up(hidden_size, 256)
254	        self.hidden_size = hidden_size
255	
256	        self.moe_runner_config = MoeRunnerConfig(
257	            num_experts=num_experts,
258	            num_local_experts=self.num_local_experts,
259	            hidden_size=hidden_size,
260	            intermediate_size_per_partition=self.intermediate_size_per_partition,
261	            layer_id=layer_id,
262	            top_k=top_k,
263	            num_fused_shared_experts=num_fused_shared_experts,
264	            params_dtype=params_dtype,
265	            activation=activation,
266	            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,
267	            inplace=inplace,
268	            no_combine=no_combine,
269	            routed_scaling_factor=routed_scaling_factor,
270	            gemm1_alpha=gemm1_alpha,
271	            gemm1_clamp_limit=gemm1_clamp_limit,
272	            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,
273	            is_gated=is_gated,
274	            routing_method_type=routing_method_type,
275	            gate_up_interleaved=gate_up_interleaved,
276	        )
277	
278	        self.quant_method: Optional[FusedMoEMethodBase] = None
279	        server_args = get_global_server_args()
280	        kt_config = create_kt_config_from_server_args(server_args, layer_id)
281	        if kt_config is not None:
282	            if quant_config is not None:
283	                gpu_method = quant_config.get_quant_method(self, prefix)
284	            else:
285	                gpu_method = UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(self.use_triton_kernels)
286	            self.quant_method = KTEPWrapperMethod(gpu_method, kt_config)
287	        else:
288	            if quant_config is not None:
289	                self.quant_method = quant_config.get_quant_method(self, prefix)
290	            if self.quant_method is None:
291	                self.quant_method = UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(
292	                    self.use_triton_kernels,
293	                    self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe,
294	                    self.use_deep_gemm,
295	                )
296	        self.supports_deferred_finalize = (
297	            envs.SGLANG_ENABLE_MOE_DEFERRED_FINALIZE.get()
298	            and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
299	            and isinstance(self.quant_method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)
300	        )
301	        print_info_once(
302	            "FlashInfer TRTLLM MoE deferred finalize is "
303	            f"{'enabled' if self.supports_deferred_finalize else 'disabled'} "
304	            f"(moe_runner_backend={server_args.moe_runner_backend}, "
305	            f"quant_method={type(self.quant_method).__name__})."
306	        )
307	
308	        self.quant_method.create_weights(
309	            layer=self,
310	            num_experts=self.num_local_experts,
311	            hidden_size=hidden_size,
312	            intermediate_size_per_partition=self.intermediate_size_per_partition,
313	            params_dtype=params_dtype,
314	            weight_loader=(
315	                self.weight_loader
316	                if not use_weight_loader_fused
317	                else self.weight_loader_fused
318	            ),
319	            with_bias=with_bias,
320	            moe_intermediate_size=intermediate_size,
321	        )
322	
323	        self.quant_method.create_moe_runner(self, self.moe_runner_config)
324	        self.dispatcher = create_moe_dispatcher(self.moe_runner_config)
325	        self._use_ascend_fuseep = get_moe_a2a_backend().is_ascend_fuseep()
326	
327	        if (
328	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
329	            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
330	        ):
331	            if self.moe_runner_config.inplace:
332	                print_info_once(
333	                    "Setting inplace to False for FlashInfer TRTLLM MoE backend."
334	                )
335	            self.moe_runner_config.inplace = False
336	
337	        self.should_fuse_routed_scaling_factor_in_topk = (
338	            isinstance(self.quant_method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)
339	            or (
340	                isinstance(self.quant_method, Fp8MoEMethod)
341	                and (
342	                    get_moe_runner_backend().is_cutlass()
343	                    or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
344	                )
345	            )
346	            or (
347	                isinstance(self.quant_method, UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod)
348	                and get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
349	            )
350	        )
351	
352	        self.routing_method_type = routing_method_type
353	
354	        # overlap args
355	        self.down_gemm_overlap_args: Optional[DownGemmOverlapArgs] = None
356	        self.meta_overlap_args: Optional[dict] = None
357	
358	        if self.quant_method is not None and hasattr(self.quant_method, "runner"):
359	            self.runner = self.quant_method.runner
360	
361	    @cached_property
362	    def use_padded_loading(self) -> bool:
363	        # This handles the case where the loaded weights are smaller than the padded expert_data
364	        # Use narrow_padded_param_and_loaded_weight for:
365	        # 1. CPU (always)
366	        # 2. GPU with flashinfer_trtllm padding (when intermediate_size is padded to 128)
367	        # 3. GPU with Aiter padding
368	        aiter_padded = (
369	            _use_aiter
370	            and hasattr(self, "w2_weight")
371	            and getattr(self.w2_weight, "weight_padded", False)
372	        )
373	
374	        return _is_cpu or self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe or aiter_padded
375	
376	    def _load_per_tensor_weight_scale(
377	        self,
378	        shard_id: str,
379	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
380	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
381	        expert_id: int,
382	    ):
383	        param_data = param.data
384	        # for per tensor weight quantization
385	        if shard_id in ("w1", "w3"):
386	            # We have to keep the weight scales of w1 and w3 because
387	            # we need to re-quantize w1/w3 weights after weight loading.
388	            idx = 0 if shard_id == "w1" else 1
389	            if self.moe_runner_config.is_gated:
390	                param_data[expert_id][idx] = loaded_weight
391	            else:
392	                param_data[expert_id] = loaded_weight
393	        # If we are in the row parallel case (down_proj)
394	        elif shard_id == "w2":
395	            param_data[expert_id] = loaded_weight
396	
397	    def _load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
398	        self,
399	        shard_dim: int,
400	        expert_data: torch.Tensor,
401	        shard_id: str,
402	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
403	        tp_rank: int,
404	        is_bias: bool = False,
405	    ):
406	        # Load grouped weight scales for group quantization
407	        # or model weights
408	        if shard_id == "w2":
409	            self._load_w2(
410	                shard_id=shard_id,
411	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
412	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
413	                expert_data=expert_data,
414	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
415	                is_bias=is_bias,
416	            )
417	        elif shard_id in ("w1", "w3", "w13"):
418	            self._load_w13(
419	                shard_id=shard_id,
420	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
421	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
422	                expert_data=expert_data,
423	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
424	                is_bias=is_bias,
425	            )
426	
427	    def _load_per_channel_weight_scale(
428	        self,
429	        expert_data: torch.Tensor,
430	        shard_dim: int,
431	        shard_id: str,
432	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
433	        tp_rank: int,
434	    ):
435	        # for per channel weight quantization
436	        if shard_id == "w2":
437	            expert_data.copy_(loaded_weight)
438	        elif shard_id in ("w1", "w3"):
439	            self._load_w13(
440	                shard_id=shard_id,
441	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
442	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
443	                expert_data=expert_data,
444	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
445	            )
446	
447	    def _load_w13(
448	        self,
449	        expert_data: torch.Tensor,
450	        shard_dim: int,
451	        shard_id: str,
452	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
453	        tp_rank: int,
454	        is_bias: bool = False,
455	    ):
456	        # Index the loaded weight for tp sharding.
457	        # gate_up_proj: "MergedColumnParallel", so tp sharding on output_dim
458	        assert shard_id in {"w1", "w3", "w13"}
459	
460	        if is_bias:
461	            # if this weight is a bias, the last dimension must be the sharded dimension
462	            shard_dim = -1
463	
464	        if shard_id in {"w1", "w3"} and self.moe_runner_config.is_gated:
465	            # non-fused version
466	            shard_size = expert_data.shape[shard_dim] // 2
467	        elif shard_id in {"w13"} or (
468	            shard_id in {"w1", "w3"} and not self.moe_runner_config.is_gated
469	        ):
470	            # fused version
471	            shard_size = expert_data.shape[shard_dim]
472	        else:
473	            raise NotImplementedError
474	
475	        # Narrow parameter and load.
476	        # w1, gate_proj: Load into first logical weight of w13.
477	        # w3, up_proj: Load into second logical weight of w13.
478	        # trtllm cutlass kernel assumes differently
479	        switch_w13 = getattr(self.quant_method, "load_up_proj_weight_first", False)
480	        if (
481	            (switch_w13 and shard_id == "w1") or (not switch_w13 and shard_id == "w3")
482	        ) and self.moe_runner_config.is_gated:
483	            start = shard_size
484	        else:
485	            start = 0
486	
487	        if self.use_padded_loading:
488	            if _is_cpu and is_bias:
489	                shard_dim = 1
490	            expert_data, loaded_weight = narrow_padded_param_and_loaded_weight(
491	                expert_data,
492	                loaded_weight,
493	                start,
494	                shard_size * tp_rank,
495	                shard_dim,
496	                shard_size,
497	                not self.use_presharded_weights,
498	            )
499	        else:
500	            if not self.use_presharded_weights:
501	                if not is_bias and self.use_triton_kernels:
502	                    # do not transpose for bias
503	                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight.transpose(-2, -1)
504	                loaded_weight = loaded_weight.narrow(
505	                    shard_dim, shard_size * tp_rank, shard_size
506	                )
507	
508	            expert_data = expert_data.narrow(shard_dim, start, shard_size)
509	        expert_data.copy_(loaded_weight)
510	
511	    def _load_w2(
512	        self,
513	        expert_data: torch.Tensor,
514	        shard_dim: int,
515	        shard_id: str,
516	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
517	        tp_rank: int,
518	        is_bias: bool = False,
519	    ):
520	        """Load w2 weights for down projection.
521	
522	        Args:
523	            expert_data: The expert data tensor to load into
524	            shard_dim: The dimension to shard along
525	            shard_id: The shard ID (must be "w2")
526	            loaded_weight: The weight tensor to load from
527	            tp_rank: The tensor parallel rank
528	        """
529	        if not isinstance(expert_data, torch.Tensor) or not isinstance(
530	            loaded_weight, torch.Tensor
531	        ):
532	            raise ValueError("expert_data and loaded_weight must be torch.Tensor")
533	
534	        if (
535	            self.quant_config is not None
536	            and "modelopt" in self.quant_config.get_name()
537	            and (expert_data.dim() != 2 or loaded_weight.dim() != 2)
538	        ):
539	            raise ValueError(
540	                f"Expected 2D tensors, got expert_data shape {expert_data.shape} and loaded_weight shape {loaded_weight.shape}"
541	            )
542	
543	        if shard_id != "w2":
544	            raise ValueError(f"shard_id must be 'w2', got {shard_id}")
545	
546	        # Index the loaded weight for tp sharding.
547	        # down_proj: "RowParallel" so tp sharding on input_dim
548	        # Narrow parameter and load.
549	        if is_bias:
550	            # this expert_data is a bias, not weight,
551	            # for w2_weight_bias in TP, it does not need to be sharded
552	            shard_size = expert_data.shape[-1]
553	        else:
554	            # this parameter is a weight matrix
555	            # for w2 in TP, it shards the input_features, i.e., shard_dim=2
556	            shard_size = expert_data.shape[shard_dim]
557	
558	        if self.use_padded_loading:
559	            if _is_cpu and is_bias:
560	                shard_dim = 1
561	            expert_data, loaded_weight = narrow_padded_param_and_loaded_weight(
562	                expert_data,
563	                loaded_weight,
564	                0,  # param_data_start
565	                shard_size * tp_rank,
566	                shard_dim,
567	                shard_size,
568	                not self.use_presharded_weights,
569	            )
570	        else:
571	            if not is_bias and not self.use_presharded_weights:
572	                if self.use_triton_kernels:
573	                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight.transpose(-2, -1)
574	                loaded_weight = loaded_weight.narrow(
575	                    shard_dim, shard_size * tp_rank, shard_size
576	                )
577	
578	        # w2, down_proj: Load into only logical weight of w2.
579	        expert_data.copy_(loaded_weight)
580	
581	    def _maybe_load_fp8_shared_expert_as_fp4(
582	        self,
583	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
584	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
585	        weight_name: str,
586	        shard_id: str,
587	        expert_id: int,
588	        shard_dim: int,
589	        tp_rank: int,
590	    ) -> bool:
591	        if (
592	            not self._has_fused_shared
593	            or expert_id < self._num_local_routed
594	            or self.quant_config is None
595	            or not getattr(self.quant_config, "is_fp4_experts", False)
596	            or shard_id not in ("w1", "w2", "w3")
597	        ):
598	            return False
599	
600	        is_weight = (
601	            "weight" in weight_name
602	            and "scale" not in weight_name
603	            and loaded_weight.dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn
604	        )
605	        is_scale = "weight_scale_inv" in weight_name and loaded_weight.dtype in (
606	            torch.float8_e8m0fnu,
607	            torch.float32,
608	        )
609	        if not is_weight and not is_scale:
610	            return False
611	
612	        weight_param = self.w2_weight if shard_id == "w2" else self.w13_weight
613	        scale_param = (
614	            self.w2_weight_scale_inv if shard_id == "w2" else self.w13_weight_scale_inv
615	        )
616	        if param is not weight_param and param is not scale_param:
617	            return False
618	
619	        key = (expert_id, shard_id)
620	        if is_weight:
621	            fp8_weight = loaded_weight
622	            fp8_scale = self._pending_fp8_shared_scales.pop(key, None)
623	            if fp8_scale is None:
624	                self._pending_fp8_shared_weights[key] = loaded_weight
625	                return True
626	        else:
627	            fp8_weight = self._pending_fp8_shared_weights.pop(key, None)
628	            fp8_scale = loaded_weight
629	            if fp8_weight is None:
630	                self._pending_fp8_shared_scales[key] = loaded_weight
631	                return True
632	
633	        logging.getLogger(__name__).warning_once(
634	            "Loading FP8 shared expert weights into FP4 fused MoE weights. "
635	            "The shared expert is quantized at load time and may differ "
636	            "slightly from a checkpoint that stores shared experts directly "
637	            "in FP4."
638	        )
639	
640	        weight_block_size = getattr(self.quant_config, "weight_block_size", None)
641	        if weight_block_size is None:
642	            raise ValueError(
643	                "Loading FP8 shared expert weights into FP4 fused MoE weights "
644	                "requires block-FP8 weight_block_size."
645	            )
646	        fp4_weight, fp4_scale = quantize_block_fp8_weight_to_mxfp4(
647	            fp8_weight, fp8_scale, weight_block_size
648	        )
649	
650	        weight_data = weight_param.data[expert_id]
651	        scale_data = scale_param.data[expert_id]
652	        self._load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
653	            shard_dim=shard_dim,
654	            expert_data=weight_data,
655	            shard_id=shard_id,
656	            loaded_weight=fp4_weight,
657	            tp_rank=tp_rank,
658	        )
659	        self._load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
660	            shard_dim=shard_dim,
661	            expert_data=scale_data,
662	            shard_id=shard_id,
663	            loaded_weight=fp4_scale,
664	            tp_rank=tp_rank,
665	        )
666	        return True
667	
668	    def _load_single_value(
669	        self, param: torch.nn.Parameter, loaded_weight: torch.Tensor, expert_id: int
670	    ):
671	        param_data = param.data
672	
673	        # Input scales can be loaded directly and should be equal.
674	        param_data[expert_id] = loaded_weight
675	
676	    def _load_g_idx(
677	        self,
678	        shard_id: str,
679	        expert_data: torch.Tensor,
680	        shard_dim: int,
681	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
682	        tp_rank: int,
683	    ):
684	        if shard_id == "w2":
685	            self._load_w2(
686	                shard_id=shard_id,
687	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
688	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
689	                expert_data=expert_data,
690	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
691	            )
692	        else:
693	            assert shard_id in ("w1", "w3")
694	            expert_data.copy_(loaded_weight)

696	    def _map_global_expert_id_to_local_expert_id(self, expert_id: int) -> int:
697	        start_idx = self.moe_ep_rank * self._num_local_routed
698	        end_idx = start_idx + self._num_local_routed
699	        if start_idx <= expert_id < end_idx:
700	            return expert_id - start_idx
701	        elif self._has_fused_shared and expert_id >= self._num_global_routed:
702	            return expert_id - self._num_global_routed + self._num_local_routed
703	        else:
704	            return -1
705	
706	    def weight_loader(
707	        self,
708	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
709	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
710	        weight_name: str,
711	        shard_id: str,
712	        expert_id: Optional[int],
713	    ) -> None:
714	        # if expert_id is None, then
715	        # all the experts are loaded at the same time
716	        if (
717	            not expert_id
718	            and self.quant_config is not None
719	            and self.quant_config.get_name() == "mxfp4"
720	            and self.quant_config.is_static_cfg()
721	        ):
722	            if "bias" in weight_name:
723	                dim1 = loaded_weight.shape[1]
724	                param.data[:, :dim1].copy_(loaded_weight)
725	            else:
726	                dim1 = loaded_weight.shape[1]
727	                dim2 = loaded_weight.shape[2]
728	                param.data[:, :dim1, :dim2].copy_(loaded_weight)
729	            return
730	
731	        global_expert_location_metadata = get_global_expert_location_metadata()
732	        if global_expert_location_metadata is None:
733	            if not getattr(param, "_sglang_require_global_experts", False):
734	                expert_id = self._map_global_expert_id_to_local_expert_id(expert_id)
735	                if expert_id == -1:
736	                    return
737	
738	            self._weight_loader_impl(
739	                param=param,
740	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
741	                weight_name=weight_name,
742	                shard_id=shard_id,
743	                expert_id=expert_id,
744	            )
745	            return
746	
747	        require_global_experts = getattr(param, "_sglang_require_global_experts", False)
748	        shared_expert_id = (
749	            expert_id - global_expert_location_metadata.num_logical_experts
750	            if self._has_fused_shared and expert_id is not None
751	            else -1
752	        )
753	        if 0 <= shared_expert_id < self.num_fused_shared_experts:
754	            # Checkpoint shared experts start after logical routed experts, while
755	            # local fused MoE weights store them after physical routed experts.
756	            if require_global_experts and uses_per_rank_fused_shared_slots():
757	                physical_expert_ids = [
758	                    rank * self.num_local_experts
759	                    + self._num_local_routed
760	                    + shared_expert_id
761	                    for rank in range(self.moe_ep_size)
762	                ]
763	            else:
764	                physical_expert_ids = [self._num_global_routed + shared_expert_id]
765	        else:
766	            physical_expert_ids = (
767	                global_expert_location_metadata.logical_to_all_physical(
768	                    self.layer_id, expert_id, require_global_experts
769	                )
770	            )
771	
772	        for physical_expert_id in physical_expert_ids:
773	            self._weight_loader_physical(
774	                param=param,
775	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
776	                weight_name=weight_name,
777	                shard_id=shard_id,
778	                expert_id=physical_expert_id,
779	            )

781	    def _weight_loader_physical(
782	        self,
783	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
784	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
785	        weight_name: str,
786	        shard_id: str,
787	        expert_id: int,
788	    ) -> None:
789	        # WARN: This makes the `expert_id` mean "local" and "global" in different cases
790	        if not getattr(param, "_sglang_require_global_experts", False):
791	            expert_id = self._map_global_expert_id_to_local_expert_id(expert_id)
792	            if expert_id < 0 or expert_id >= self.num_local_experts:
793	                return
794	
795	        if isinstance(
796	            self.quant_method,
797	            KTEPWrapperMethod,
798	        ):
799	            if self.quant_method.num_gpu_experts != -1:
800	                if expert_id >= self.quant_method.num_gpu_experts:
801	                    return
802	
803	        self._weight_loader_impl(
804	            param=param,
805	            loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
806	            weight_name=weight_name,
807	            shard_id=shard_id,
808	            expert_id=expert_id,
809	        )

811	    def _load_gguf_weight(
812	        self,
813	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
814	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
815	        shard_id: str,
816	        expert_id: int,
817	        tp_rank: int,
818	    ) -> bool:
819	        """Handle GGUF weight loading.
820	
821	        Args:
822	            param: The parameter to load the weight into.
823	            loaded_weight: The weight tensor to load.
824	            shard_id: The shard ID (w1, w2, or w3).
825	            expert_id: The expert ID.
826	            tp_rank: The tensor parallel rank.
827	
828	        Returns:
829	            True if the weight was handled as a GGUF weight, False otherwise.
830	        """
831	        is_gguf_weight = getattr(param, "is_gguf_weight", False)
832	        is_gguf_weight_type = getattr(param, "is_gguf_weight_type", False)
833	
834	        if is_gguf_weight_type:
835	            # Store weight type for this expert
836	            param.weight_type = loaded_weight.item()
837	            return True
838	
839	        if is_gguf_weight:
840	            output_dim = getattr(param, "output_dim", None)
841	            if self.moe_tp_size > 1:
842	                if shard_id in ["w1", "w3", "w2"] and output_dim == 0:
843	                    shard_size = loaded_weight.size(0) // self.moe_tp_size
844	                    start_idx = tp_rank * shard_size
845	                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight.narrow(
846	                        0, start_idx, shard_size
847	                    ).clone()
848	
849	            # Store in data_container with expert/shard info
850	            if not hasattr(param, "expert_data_map"):
851	                param.expert_data_map = {}
852	
853	            key = (expert_id, shard_id)
854	            param.expert_data_map[key] = loaded_weight
855	            param.data_container.append(loaded_weight)
856	            return True
857	
858	        return False
859	
860	    def _weight_loader_impl(
861	        self,
862	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
863	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
864	        weight_name: str,
865	        shard_id: str,
866	        expert_id: int,
867	    ) -> None:
868	        tp_rank = self.moe_tp_rank
869	
870	        # Special case for GGUF weights
871	        if self._load_gguf_weight(param, loaded_weight, shard_id, expert_id, tp_rank):
872	            return
873	
874	        # compressed-tensors checkpoints with packed weights are stored flipped
875	        # TODO (mgoin): check self.quant_method.quant_config.quant_format
876	        # against known CompressionFormat enum values that have this quality
877	        method = self.quant_method
878	        if hasattr(self, "scheme"):
879	            method = self.scheme
880	        if method.__class__.__name__ == "KTEPWrapperMethod":
881	            method = method.gpu_method
882	
883	        # For flashinfer TRT-LLM BF16 path, process_weights_after_loading reshapes
884	        # expert weights into block layout. During weight update, we must restore
885	        # canonical load-time shapes before copying checkpoint tensors.
886	        if isinstance(method, UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod):
887	            method.maybe_restore_flashinfer_trtllm_bf16_weight_shape_for_load(
888	                layer=self,
889	                param=param,
890	                weight_name=weight_name,
891	            )
892	        elif isinstance(method, Fp8MoEMethod) and (
893	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
894	            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
895	        ):
896	            # Drop the GPU mxfp8 shuffle-index cache on every reload for mxfp8 trtllm, trtllm_routed
897	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_trtllm import (
898	                clear_mxfp8_shuffle_index_cache,
899	            )
900	
901	            clear_mxfp8_shuffle_index_cache()
902	
903	        loaded_weight = (
904	            loaded_weight.t().contiguous()
905	            if (
906	                method.__class__.__name__
907	                in [
908	                    "CompressedTensorsWNA16MarlinMoE",
909	                    "CompressedTensorsWNA16MoE",
910	                    "CompressedTensorsWNA16TritonMoE",
911	                ]
912	            )
913	            and "zero" not in weight_name
914	            else loaded_weight
915	        )
916	
917	        if shard_id not in ("w1", "w2", "w3"):
918	            raise ValueError(f"shard_id must be ['w1','w2','w3'] but got {shard_id}.")
919	
920	        # Flashinfer assumes w31 format for w13_weight. Same for the scales.
921	        if self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe and (
922	            isinstance(method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)
923	            or isinstance(method, Fp8MoEMethod)
924	            or isinstance(method, UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod)
925	            or isinstance(method, CompressedTensorsMxInt4MoE)
926	        ):
927	            shard_id = {"w1": "w3", "w3": "w1", "w2": "w2"}[shard_id]
928	
929	        WEIGHT_SCALE_SUPPORTED = [e.value for e in FusedMoeWeightScaleSupported]
930	        # Fetch the dim to shard the parameter/loaded weight
931	        # based on the shard id. This will be whatever
932	        # dimension intermediate_size is used.
933	        SHARD_ID_TO_SHARDED_DIM = {"w1": 0, "w2": 1, "w3": 0}
934	
935	        expert_data = param.data[expert_id]
936	
937	        # is_transposed: if the dim to shard the weight
938	        # should be flipped. Required by GPTQ, compressed-tensors
939	        # should be whatever dimension intermediate_size is
940	        is_transposed = getattr(param, "is_transposed", False)
941	        shard_dim = SHARD_ID_TO_SHARDED_DIM[shard_id]
942	        if self.use_triton_kernels:
943	            is_transposed = True
944	        if is_transposed:
945	            shard_dim = int(not shard_dim)
946	
947	        if self._maybe_load_fp8_shared_expert_as_fp4(
948	            param=param,
949	            loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
950	            weight_name=weight_name,
951	            shard_id=shard_id,
952	            expert_id=expert_id,
953	            shard_dim=shard_dim,
954	            tp_rank=tp_rank,
955	        ):
956	            return
957	
958	        # Case input scale: input_scale loading is only supported for fp8
959	        if "input_scale" in weight_name:
960	            # INT4-FP8 (INT4 MoE Weight, FP8 Compute): Adjust input_scale for e4m3fnuz (AMD)
961	            if _is_hip and get_bool_env_var("SGLANG_INT4_WEIGHT"):
962	                loaded_weight = loaded_weight * 2.0
963	
964	            # this is needed for compressed-tensors only
965	            loaded_weight = loaded_weight.to(param.data.device)
966	
967	            if (
968	                (
969	                    "compressed" in method.__class__.__name__.lower()
970	                    or "w4afp8" in self.quant_config.get_name()
971	                )
972	                and (param.data[expert_id] != 1).any()
973	                and ((param.data[expert_id] - loaded_weight).abs() > 1e-5).any()
974	            ):
975	                raise ValueError(
976	                    "input_scales of w1 and w3 of a layer "
977	                    f"must be equal. But got {param.data[expert_id]} "
978	                    f"vs. {loaded_weight}"
979	                )
980	
981	            self._load_single_value(
982	                param=param, loaded_weight=loaded_weight, expert_id=expert_id
983	            )
984	            return
985	
986	        # Case g_idx
987	        if "g_idx" in weight_name:
988	            self._load_g_idx(
989	                shard_dim=0,
990	                shard_id=shard_id,
991	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
992	                expert_data=expert_data,
993	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
994	            )
995	            return
996	
997	        if "ModelOpt" in method.__class__.__name__:
998	            # Determine per-tensor weight scale patterns based on variant
999	            is_fp4_variant = isinstance(method, ModelOptNvFp4FusedMoEMethod)
1000	
1001	            # FP4 uses "weight_scale_2" for per-tensor, FP8 uses "weight_scale" for per-tensor
1002	            per_tensor_conditions = (
1003	                "weight_scale_2" in weight_name
1004	                if is_fp4_variant
1005	                else "weight_scale" in weight_name
1006	            ) or "input_scale" in weight_name
1007	
1008	            if per_tensor_conditions:
1009	                self._load_per_tensor_weight_scale(
1010	                    shard_id=shard_id,
1011	                    param=param,
1012	                    loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1013	                    expert_id=expert_id,
1014	                )
1015	            elif "weight" in weight_name:
1016	                self._load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
1017	                    shard_id=shard_id,
1018	                    shard_dim=shard_dim,
1019	                    loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1020	                    expert_data=expert_data,
1021	                    tp_rank=tp_rank,
1022	                )
1023	            return
1024	
1025	        # Case weight scales and zero_points
1026	        if "scale" in weight_name or "zero" in weight_name or "offset" in weight_name:
1027	            # load the weight scales and zp based on the quantization scheme
1028	            # supported weight scales/zp can be found in
1029	            # FusedMoeWeightScaleSupported
1030	            # TODO @dsikka: once hardened, refactor to use vLLM Parameters
1031	            # specific to each case
1032	            quant_method = getattr(param, "quant_method", None)
1033	            if quant_method == FusedMoeWeightScaleSupported.CHANNEL.value:
1034	                # INT4-FP8 (INT4 MoE Weight, FP8 Compute): Adjust INT4 column-wise scaling number to e4m3fnuz (AMD)
1035	                if _is_hip and get_bool_env_var("SGLANG_INT4_WEIGHT"):
1036	                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight * 0.5
1037	
1038	                self._load_per_channel_weight_scale(
1039	                    shard_id=shard_id,
1040	                    shard_dim=shard_dim,
1041	                    loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1042	                    expert_data=expert_data,
1043	                    tp_rank=tp_rank,
1044	                )
1045	            elif quant_method in [
1046	                FusedMoeWeightScaleSupported.GROUP.value,
1047	                FusedMoeWeightScaleSupported.BLOCK.value,
1048	            ]:
1049	                self._load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
1050	                    shard_id=shard_id,
1051	                    shard_dim=shard_dim,
1052	                    loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1053	                    expert_data=expert_data,
1054	                    tp_rank=tp_rank,
1055	                )
1056	            elif quant_method == FusedMoeWeightScaleSupported.TENSOR.value:
1057	                # INT4-FP8 (INT4 MoE Weight, FP8 Compute): Adjust FP8 per-tensor scaling number for e4m3fnuz (AMD)
1058	                if _is_hip and get_bool_env_var("SGLANG_INT4_WEIGHT"):
1059	                    loaded_weight = loaded_weight * 2.0
1060	
1061	                self._load_per_tensor_weight_scale(
1062	                    shard_id=shard_id,
1063	                    param=param,
1064	                    loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1065	                    expert_id=expert_id,
1066	                )
1067	            else:
1068	                raise ValueError(
1069	                    f"quant method must be one of {WEIGHT_SCALE_SUPPORTED}"
1070	                )
1071	            return
1072	
1073	        # Case weight_shape
1074	        if "weight_shape" in weight_name:
1075	            # only required by compressed-tensors
1076	            self._load_single_value(
1077	                param=param, loaded_weight=loaded_weight, expert_id=expert_id
1078	            )
1079	            return
1080	
1081	        # Case model weights
1082	        if "weight" in weight_name:
1083	            self._load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
1084	                shard_id=shard_id,
1085	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
1086	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1087	                expert_data=expert_data,
1088	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
1089	            )
1090	            return
1091	
1092	        if (
1093	            "bias" in weight_name
1094	            and self.quant_config.quant_description["quant_method"] == "modelslim"
1095	        ):
1096	            self._load_per_channel_weight_scale(
1097	                shard_id=shard_id,
1098	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
1099	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1100	                expert_data=expert_data,
1101	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
1102	            )

1104	    def weight_loader_fused(
1105	        self,
1106	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
1107	        loaded_weight: torch.Tensor,
1108	        weight_name: str,
1109	        shard_id: str,
1110	    ) -> None:
1111	        tp_rank = self.moe_tp_rank
1112	
1113	        if (
1114	            self.quant_config is not None
1115	            and self.quant_config.get_name() == "mxfp4"
1116	            and self.quant_config.is_static_cfg()
1117	        ):
1118	            if "bias" in weight_name:
1119	                dim1 = loaded_weight.shape[1]
1120	                param.data[:, :dim1].copy_(loaded_weight)
1121	            elif "scale" in weight_name:
1122	                param.data.copy_(loaded_weight)
1123	            else:
1124	                dim1 = loaded_weight.shape[1]
1125	                dim2 = loaded_weight.shape[2]
1126	                param.data[:, :dim1, :dim2].copy_(loaded_weight)
1127	            return
1128	
1129	        # compressed-tensors checkpoints with packed weights are stored flipped
1130	        # TODO: check self.quant_method.quant_config.quant_format
1131	        # against known CompressionFormat enum values that have this quality
1132	        method = self.quant_method
1133	        if hasattr(self, "scheme"):
1134	            method = self.scheme
1135	        if isinstance(method, Fp8MoEMethod) and (
1136	            get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
1137	            or get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm()
1138	        ):
1139	            # Drop the GPU mxfp8 shuffle-index cache on every reload for mxfp8 trtllm, trtllm_routed
1140	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_trtllm import (
1141	                clear_mxfp8_shuffle_index_cache,
1142	            )
1143	
1144	            clear_mxfp8_shuffle_index_cache()
1145	        loaded_weight = (
1146	            loaded_weight.t().contiguous()
1147	            if (
1148	                method.__class__.__name__
1149	                in [
1150	                    "CompressedTensorsWNA16MoE",
1151	                    "CompressedTensorsWNA16TritonMoE",
1152	                ]
1153	            )
1154	            and "zero" not in weight_name
1155	            else loaded_weight
1156	        )
1157	
1158	        if shard_id not in ("w13", "w2"):
1159	            raise ValueError(f"shard_id must be ['w13','w2'] but got {shard_id}.")
1160	
1161	        # Fetch the dim to shard the parameter/loaded weight
1162	        # based on the shard id. This will be whatever
1163	        # dimension intermediate_size is used.
1164	        SHARD_ID_TO_SHARDED_DIM = {"w13": 1, "w2": 2}
1165	        SHARD_ID_TO_SHARDED_DIM_TRANSPOSE = {"w13": 2, "w2": 1}
1166	
1167	        expert_data = param.data
1168	        is_bias = expert_data.dim() == 2
1169	
1170	        # is_transposed: if the dim to shard the weight
1171	        # should be flipped. Required by GPTQ, compressed-tensors
1172	        # should be whatever dimension intermediate_size is
1173	        is_transposed = getattr(param, "is_transposed", False)
1174	
1175	        if self.use_triton_kernels:
1176	            is_transposed = True
1177	        shard_dim = (
1178	            SHARD_ID_TO_SHARDED_DIM[shard_id]
1179	            if not is_transposed
1180	            else SHARD_ID_TO_SHARDED_DIM_TRANSPOSE[shard_id]
1181	        )
1182	
1183	        # Case model weights
1184	        if "weight" in weight_name:
1185	            self._load_model_weight_or_group_weight_scale(
1186	                shard_id=shard_id,
1187	                shard_dim=shard_dim,
1188	                loaded_weight=loaded_weight,
1189	                expert_data=expert_data,
1190	                tp_rank=tp_rank,
1191	                is_bias=is_bias,
1192	            )
1193	            return
1194	        else:
1195	            logging.warning(
1196	                f"Unsupported weight_name {weight_name} for FusedMoE weight_loader_fused. Nothing is loaded."
1197	            )

1199	    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, topk_output: TopKOutput):
1200	        if self._use_ascend_fuseep:
1201	            from sglang.srt.hardware_backend.npu.moe.fuseep import forward_fuseep
1202	
1203	            return forward_fuseep(self, hidden_states, topk_output)
1204	        if is_in_tc_piecewise_cuda_graph():
1205	            if TopKOutputChecker.format_is_standard(topk_output):
1206	                return moe_forward_piecewise_cuda_graph_impl(
1207	                    hidden_states,
1208	                    topk_output.topk_weights,
1209	                    topk_output.topk_ids,
1210	                    topk_output.router_logits,
1211	                    self.layer_id,
1212	                )
1213	            elif TopKOutputChecker.format_is_bypassed(topk_output):
1214	                return fused_moe_bypassed_piecewise_cuda_graph_impl(
1215	                    hidden_states,
1216	                    topk_output.router_logits,
1217	                    topk_output.topk_config.top_k,
1218	                    topk_output.topk_config.topk_group,
1219	                    topk_output.topk_config.num_expert_group,
1220	                    topk_output.topk_config.correction_bias,
1221	                    topk_output.topk_config.renormalize,
1222	                    self.layer_id,
1223	                    topk_output.topk_config.allow_routed_experts_capture,
1224	                )
1225	            else:
1226	                # Make sure there is torch lib op registration for the whole moe layer
1227	                return self.forward_impl(hidden_states, topk_output)
1228	        else:
1229	            return self.forward_impl(hidden_states, topk_output)
1230	
1231	    def forward_impl(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, topk_output: TopKOutput):
1232	        origin_hidden_states_dim = hidden_states.shape[-1]
1233	        assert self.quant_method is not None
1234	
1235	        dispatch_output = self.dispatcher.dispatch(
1236	            hidden_states=hidden_states, topk_output=topk_output
1237	        )
1238	
1239	        combine_input = self.run_moe_core(
1240	            dispatch_output=dispatch_output,
1241	        )
1242	
1243	        with use_symmetric_memory(
1244	            get_tp_group(), disabled=not is_allocation_symmetric()
1245	        ):
1246	            final_hidden_states = self.dispatcher.combine(combine_input=combine_input)
1247	
1248	            # TODO: should we add some conditions here?
1249	            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[
1250	                ..., :origin_hidden_states_dim
1251	            ].contiguous()
1252	
1253	        if self.reduce_results and (self.moe_tp_size > 1 or self.moe_ep_size > 1):
1254	            final_hidden_states = tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce(final_hidden_states)
1255	
1256	        return final_hidden_states
1257	
1258	    def forward_deferred_finalize(
1259	        self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, topk_output: TopKOutput
1260	    ):
1261	        assert self.quant_method is not None
1262	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_trtllm import (
1263	            flashinfer_trtllm_deferred_finalize_context,
1264	        )
1265	
1266	        dispatch_output = self.dispatcher.dispatch(
1267	            hidden_states=hidden_states, topk_output=topk_output
1268	        )
1269	
1270	        with flashinfer_trtllm_deferred_finalize_context():
1271	            combine_input = self.run_moe_core(dispatch_output=dispatch_output)
1272	
1273	        return self.dispatcher.combine(combine_input=combine_input)
1274	
1275	    def run_moe_core(self, dispatch_output: DispatchOutput) -> CombineInput:
1276	        # TODO: consider using symmetric memory
1277	        return self.quant_method.apply(
1278	            layer=self,
1279	            dispatch_output=dispatch_output,
1280	        )
1281	
1282	    @classmethod
1283	    def make_expert_params_mapping(
1284	        cls,
1285	        ckpt_gate_proj_name: str,
1286	        ckpt_down_proj_name: str,
1287	        ckpt_up_proj_name: str,
1288	        num_experts: int,
1289	    ) -> List[Tuple[str, str, int, str]]:
1290	        return [
1291	            # (param_name, weight_name, expert_id, shard_id)
1292	            (
1293	                (
1294	                    "experts.w13_"
1295	                    if weight_name in [ckpt_gate_proj_name, ckpt_up_proj_name]
1296	                    else "experts.w2_"
1297	                ),
1298	                f"experts.{expert_id}.{weight_name}.",
1299	                expert_id,
1300	                shard_id,
1301	            )
1302	            for expert_id in range(num_experts)
1303	            for shard_id, weight_name in [
1304	                ("w1", ckpt_gate_proj_name),
1305	                ("w2", ckpt_down_proj_name),
1306	                ("w3", ckpt_up_proj_name),
1307	            ]
1308	        ]

1358	        cls,

1366	                expert_id,
1367	                shard_id,
1368	            )
1369	            for expert_id in range(num_experts)
1370	            for shard_id in ["w1", "w2", "w3"]
1371	        ]

1373	    def set_overlap_args(
1374	        self, down_gemm_overlap_args: DownGemmOverlapArgs, meta_overlap_args: dict
1375	    ):
1376	        if hasattr(self, "runner"):
1377	            self.runner.set_overlap_args(down_gemm_overlap_args, meta_overlap_args)
1378	        else:
1379	            # TODO: remove this branch after MoE refactor
1380	            self.down_gemm_overlap_args = down_gemm_overlap_args
1381	            self.meta_overlap_args = meta_overlap_args
1382	
1383	    def clear_overlap_args(self) -> None:
1384	        if hasattr(self, "runner"):
1385	            self.runner.clear_overlap_args()
1386	        else:
1387	            # TODO: remove this branch after MoE refactor
1388	            self.down_gemm_overlap_args = None
1389	            self.meta_overlap_args = None

1391	    def materialize_gguf_weights(self) -> None:
1392	        """Process weights after loading, especially for GGUF quantization.
1393	
1394	        This materializes GGUF UninitializedParameters from their data_containers.
1395	        """
1396	
1397	        for name, param in list(self.named_parameters()):
1398	            is_gguf_weight = getattr(param, "is_gguf_weight", False)
1399	
1400	            if is_gguf_weight and isinstance(param, UninitializedParameter):
1401	                data_container = getattr(param, "data_container", [])
1402	                expert_data_map = getattr(param, "expert_data_map", {})
1403	                tensor_shape = getattr(param, "tensor_shape", None)
1404	
1405	                if data_container and tensor_shape:
1406	                    # Determine the structure from expert_data_map
1407	                    num_experts = tensor_shape[0]
1408	
1409	                    # Collect weights by expert
1410	                    expert_weights = {}
1411	                    for (expert_id, shard_id), weight in expert_data_map.items():
1412	                        if expert_id not in expert_weights:
1413	                            expert_weights[expert_id] = {}
1414	                        expert_weights[expert_id][shard_id] = weight
1415	
1416	                    # Build the full tensor
1417	                    if "w13" in name:
1418	                        # w13 is gate+up fused
1419	                        weight_list = []
1420	                        for e in range(num_experts):
1421	                            if e in expert_weights:
1422	                                w1 = expert_weights[e].get("w1")
1423	                                w3 = expert_weights[e].get("w3")
1424	
1425	                                if w1 is not None and w3 is not None:
1426	                                    fused = torch.cat([w1, w3], dim=0)
1427	                                    weight_list.append(fused)
1428	
1429	                        if weight_list:
1430	                            stacked = torch.stack(weight_list, dim=0)
1431	                            param.materialize(stacked.shape, dtype=stacked.dtype)
1432	                            param.data.copy_(stacked)
1433	                    elif "w2" in name:
1434	                        # w2 is down projection
1435	                        weight_list = []
1436	                        for e in range(num_experts):
1437	                            if e in expert_weights and "w2" in expert_weights[e]:
1438	                                w2_weight = expert_weights[e]["w2"]
1439	                                weight_list.append(w2_weight)
1440	
1441	                        if weight_list:
1442	                            stacked = torch.stack(weight_list, dim=0)
1443	                            param.materialize(stacked.shape, dtype=stacked.dtype)
1444	                            param.data.copy_(stacked)
1445	
1446	
1447	@register_custom_op(out_shape="hidden_states")
1448	def moe_forward_piecewise_cuda_graph_impl(
1449	    hidden_states: torch.Tensor,
1450	    topk_weights: torch.Tensor,
1451	    topk_ids: torch.Tensor,
1452	    router_logits: torch.Tensor,
1453	    layer_id: int,
1454	) -> torch.Tensor:
1455	    # only standard topk output is supported for piecewise cuda graph
1456	    topk_output = StandardTopKOutput(
1457	        topk_weights=topk_weights, topk_ids=topk_ids, router_logits=router_logits
1458	    )
1459	    forward_context = get_tc_piecewise_forward_context()
1460	    moe_layer = forward_context.moe_layers[layer_id]
1461	    return moe_layer.forward_impl(hidden_states, topk_output)

78	def pp_filter_load_weight(
79	    name,
80	    loaded_weight,
81	    *,
82	    pp_group,
83	    start_layer,
84	    end_layer,
85	    params_dict,
86	    loaded_params,
87	    tie_word_embeddings,
88	    embed_weight_name,
89	    first_rank_only_patterns=(),
90	    last_rank_only_prefixes=(),
91	    head_param_name="lm_head.weight",
92	):
93	    """Shared PP filter for Gemma4 load_weights paths.
94	
95	    Returns True if the caller should ``continue`` (handled or skipped),
96	    False otherwise.  No-op when ``pp_group.world_size == 1``.
97	
98	    Handles three concerns in order:
99	      1. Drop transformer-layer weights outside [start_layer, end_layer).
100	      2. Route the tied ``embed_tokens.weight`` to ``lm_head`` on the last
101	         rank (under PP, embed and lm_head live on different ranks so they
102	         can't be tied via module aliasing).
103	      3. Skip rank-local module weights on the wrong rank.
104	    """
105	    if pp_group.world_size <= 1:
106	        return False
107	
108	    layer_id = get_layer_id(name)
109	    if layer_id is not None and (layer_id < start_layer or layer_id >= end_layer):
110	        return True
111	
112	    if tie_word_embeddings and pp_group.is_last_rank and name == embed_weight_name:
113	        head_param = params_dict.get(head_param_name)
114	        if head_param is not None:
115	            wl = getattr(head_param, "weight_loader", default_weight_loader)
116	            wl(head_param, loaded_weight)
117	            loaded_params.add(head_param_name)
118	        return True
119	
120	    if not pp_group.is_first_rank and any(p in name for p in first_rank_only_patterns):
121	        return True
122	
123	    if not pp_group.is_last_rank and any(
124	        name.startswith(p) for p in last_rank_only_prefixes
125	    ):
126	        return True
127	
128	    return False

131	class Gemma4Router(nn.Module):
132	    """Router for Gemma4 MoE that preprocesses input before projection.
133	
134	    Applies RMSNorm (no learned weight), root_size scaling
135	    (hidden_size^{-0.5}), then a learned per-dimension scale before
136	    projecting to expert logits.
137	
138	    This preprocessing is applied ONLY to the router's input, not to
139	    the expert MLPs' input.
140	    """
141	
142	    def __init__(
143	        self,
144	        config,
145	        quant_config: QuantizationConfig | None = None,
146	        prefix: str = "",
147	    ) -> None:
148	        super().__init__()
149	        self.hidden_size = config.hidden_size
150	
151	        # RMSNorm without learned weight — scale is folded into norm weight
152	        # after loading so forward is a single fused norm kernel.
153	        self.norm = Gemma4RMSNorm(
154	            self.hidden_size, eps=config.rms_norm_eps, with_scale=False
155	        )
156	        # Per-dimension learned scale, applied after norm + root_size
157	        self.scale = nn.Parameter(torch.ones(self.hidden_size))
158	        # Constant 1/sqrt(hidden_size) scaling factor
159	        self.register_buffer(
160	            "root_size",
161	            torch.tensor(self.hidden_size**-0.5),
162	            persistent=False,
163	        )
164	        # Project to expert logits; replicated across TP for consistent routing
165	        self.proj = ReplicatedLinear(
166	            self.hidden_size,
167	            config.num_experts,
168	            bias=False,
169	            quant_config=None,
170	            prefix=add_prefix("proj", prefix),
171	        )
172	        self._scale_fused = False
173	
174	    def fuse_scale(self):
175	        """Fold scale * root_size into norm.weight so forward needs no extra mul."""
176	        fused = (self.scale * self.root_size).to(self.norm.weight.dtype)
177	        self.norm.weight.data.copy_(fused)
178	        self._scale_fused = True
179	
180	    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
181	        """Returns raw router logits [T, E]."""
182	        if not self._scale_fused:
183	            self.fuse_scale()
184	        x = self.norm(x)
185	        router_logits, _ = self.proj(x)
186	        return router_logits
187
