114	class UnquantizedEmbeddingMethod(QuantizeMethodBase):
115	    """Unquantized method for embeddings."""
116	
117	    def create_weights(
118	        self,
119	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
120	        input_size_per_partition: int,
121	        output_partition_sizes: List[int],
122	        input_size: int,
123	        output_size: int,
124	        params_dtype: torch.dtype,
125	        **extra_weight_attrs,
126	    ):
127	        """Create weights for embedding layer."""
128	        weight = Parameter(
129	            torch.empty(
130	                sum(output_partition_sizes),
131	                input_size_per_partition,
132	                dtype=params_dtype,
133	            ),
134	            requires_grad=False,
135	        )
136	        set_weight_attrs(weight, {"input_dim": 1, "output_dim": 0})
137	        layer.register_parameter("weight", weight)
138	        set_weight_attrs(weight, extra_weight_attrs)
139	
140	    def apply(
141	        self,
142	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
143	        x: torch.Tensor,
144	        bias: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
145	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
146	        return F.linear(x, layer.weight, bias)
147	
148	    def embedding(self, layer: torch.nn.Module, input_: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
149	        return F.embedding(input_, layer.weight)
150	
151	
152	class UnquantizedLinearMethod(LinearMethodBase):
153	    """Linear method without quantization."""
154	
155	    def create_weights(
156	        self,
157	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
158	        input_size_per_partition: int,
159	        output_partition_sizes: List[int],
160	        input_size: int,
161	        output_size: int,
162	        params_dtype: torch.dtype,
163	        **extra_weight_attrs,
164	    ):
165	        weight = Parameter(
166	            torch.empty(
167	                sum(output_partition_sizes),
168	                input_size_per_partition,
169	                dtype=params_dtype,
170	            ),
171	            requires_grad=False,
172	        )
173	        set_weight_attrs(weight, {"input_dim": 1, "output_dim": 0})
174	        layer.register_parameter("weight", weight)
175	        set_weight_attrs(weight, extra_weight_attrs)
176	
177	    def process_weights_after_loading(self, layer: torch.nn.Module) -> None:
178	        if _is_cpu and _is_cpu_amx_available:
179	            _amx_process_weight_after_loading(layer, ["weight"])
180	
181	    def apply(
182	        self,
183	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
184	        x: torch.Tensor,
185	        bias: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
186	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
187	        if use_intel_amx_backend(layer):
188	            x_shapes = x.shape
189	            if len(x_shapes) == 3:
190	                x = x.view(-1, x.shape[-1])
191	            output = torch.ops.sgl_kernel.weight_packed_linear(
192	                x,
193	                layer.weight,
194	                bias,
195	                True,  # is_vnni
196	            )
197	            if len(x_shapes) == 3:
198	                output = output.view(x_shapes[0], x_shapes[1], -1)
199	            return output
200	
201	        elif _use_aiter and type(layer.weight.data) is torch.Tensor:
202	            return tgemm.mm(x, layer.weight, bias, otype=x.dtype)
203	
204	        elif (
205	            get_bf16_gemm_backend().is_cutedsl()
206	            and x.is_cuda
207	            and x.dtype == torch.bfloat16
208	            and layer.weight.dtype == torch.bfloat16
209	            and (bias is None or bias.dtype == torch.bfloat16)
210	            and _use_cutedsl_bf16_gemm(
211	                x.numel() // x.shape[-1],
212	                layer.weight.shape[0],
213	                layer.weight.shape[1],
214	            )
215	        ):
216	            x_shapes = x.shape
217	            output = _cutedsl_bf16_gemm(x.view(-1, x_shapes[-1]), layer.weight, bias)
218	            return output.view(*x_shapes[:-1], -1)
219	
220	        return F.linear(x, layer.weight, bias)
221	
222	
223	class UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod(FusedMoEMethodBase, MultiPlatformOp):
224	    """MoE method without quantization."""
225	
226	    def __init__(
227	        self,
228	        use_triton_kernels: bool = False,
229	        use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe: bool = False,
230	        use_deep_gemm: bool = False,
231	    ):
232	        super().__init__()
233	        self.use_flashinfer_cutlass = get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_cutlass()
234	        self.use_triton_kernels = use_triton_kernels
235	        self.with_bias = False
236	        self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe = use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe
237	        self.use_deep_gemm = use_deep_gemm
238	        self._cache_permute_indices = dict({})
239	
240	    def create_weights(
241	        self,
242	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
243	        num_experts: int,
244	        hidden_size: int,
245	        intermediate_size_per_partition: int,
246	        params_dtype: torch.dtype,
247	        with_bias: bool = False,
248	        **extra_weight_attrs,
249	    ):
250	        self.with_bias = with_bias
251	
252	        # Fused gate_up_proj (column parallel)
253	        w13_up_dim = (
254	            2 * intermediate_size_per_partition
255	            if layer.moe_runner_config.is_gated
256	            else intermediate_size_per_partition
257	        )
258	        w13_weight_n, w13_weight_k = (w13_up_dim, hidden_size)
259	        if self.use_triton_kernels:
260	            w13_weight_n, w13_weight_k = w13_weight_k, w13_weight_n
261	        w13_weight = torch.nn.Parameter(
262	            torch.empty(num_experts, w13_weight_n, w13_weight_k, dtype=params_dtype),
263	            requires_grad=False,
264	        )
265	        layer.register_parameter("w13_weight", w13_weight)
266	        set_weight_attrs(w13_weight, extra_weight_attrs)
267	
268	        if self.with_bias:
269	            w13_weight_bias = torch.nn.Parameter(
270	                torch.empty(num_experts, w13_up_dim, dtype=torch.float32),
271	                requires_grad=False,
272	            )
273	            layer.register_parameter("w13_weight_bias", w13_weight_bias)
274	            set_weight_attrs(w13_weight_bias, extra_weight_attrs)
275	
276	        # down_proj (row parallel)
277	        w2_weight_n, w2_weight_k = (
278	            hidden_size,
279	            intermediate_size_per_partition,
280	        )
281	        if self.use_triton_kernels:
282	            w2_weight_n, w2_weight_k = w2_weight_k, w2_weight_n
283	        w2_weight = torch.nn.Parameter(
284	            torch.empty(num_experts, w2_weight_n, w2_weight_k, dtype=params_dtype),
285	            requires_grad=False,
286	        )
287	        layer.register_parameter("w2_weight", w2_weight)
288	        set_weight_attrs(w2_weight, extra_weight_attrs)
289	
290	        if self.with_bias:
291	            w2_weight_bias = torch.nn.Parameter(
292	                torch.empty(num_experts, hidden_size, dtype=torch.float32),
293	                requires_grad=False,
294	            )
295	            layer.register_parameter("w2_weight_bias", w2_weight_bias)
296	            set_weight_attrs(w2_weight_bias, extra_weight_attrs)
297	
298	    def process_weights_after_loading(self, layer: torch.nn.Module) -> None:
299	        _should_use_aiter_moe = (
300	            _use_aiter
301	            and (
302	                get_moe_runner_backend().is_auto()
303	                or get_moe_runner_backend().is_aiter()
304	            )
305	            and self._aiter_ck_moe_supported(layer)
306	        )
307	        if _should_use_aiter_moe:
308	            copy_or_rebind_param(
309	                layer, "w13_weight", shuffle_weight(layer.w13_weight.data, (16, 16))
310	            )
311	            torch.cuda.empty_cache()
312	            copy_or_rebind_param(
313	                layer, "w2_weight", shuffle_weight(layer.w2_weight.data, (16, 16))
314	            )
315	            torch.cuda.empty_cache()
316	
317	        # Pack weight for get better performance on CPU
318	        if _is_cpu and _is_cpu_amx_available:
319	            _amx_process_weight_after_loading(layer, ["w13_weight", "w2_weight"])
320	            if hasattr(layer, "w13_weight_bias"):
321	                layer.w13_weight_bias = Parameter(
322	                    layer.w13_weight_bias.float(), requires_grad=False
323	                )
324	            if hasattr(layer, "w2_weight_bias"):
325	                layer.w2_weight_bias = Parameter(
326	                    layer.w2_weight_bias.float(), requires_grad=False
327	                )
328	
329	        if (
330	            self.use_deep_gemm
331	            and layer.w13_weight.dtype == torch.bfloat16
332	            and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_deepep()
333	            and get_deepep_mode().enable_low_latency()
334	            and not _is_npu
335	            and not _is_hip
336	            and hasattr(layer, "dispatcher")
337	        ):
338	            layer.dispatcher.set_quant_config({"dispatcher_output_dtype": "bf16"})
339	
340	        # Reorder rows of W1 for fused gated activation
341	        if self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe:
342	            from flashinfer.fused_moe.core import (
343	                _maybe_get_cached_w3_w1_permute_indices,
344	                convert_to_block_layout,
345	                get_w2_permute_indices_with_cache,
346	            )
347	
348	            # w1 and w3 have been swapped, so we don't need do that here
349	            epilogue_tile_m = 128
350	            block_k = 128
351	            old_shape_w13 = layer.w13_weight.data[0].shape
352	            old_shape_w2 = layer.w2_weight.data[0].shape
353	            new_shape_w13 = None
354	            new_shape_w2 = None
355	            for i in range(layer.num_local_experts):
356	                permute_indices = _maybe_get_cached_w3_w1_permute_indices(
357	                    self._cache_permute_indices,
358	                    layer.w13_weight.data[i].view(torch.uint8),
359	                    epilogue_tile_m,
360	                    is_gated_act_gemm=layer.moe_runner_config.is_gated,
361	                )
362	                tmp_weights1 = (
363	                    layer.w13_weight.data[i]
364	                    .clone()
365	                    .view(torch.uint8)[permute_indices.to(layer.w13_weight.data.device)]
366	                    .contiguous()
367	                )
368	
369	                permute_indices = get_w2_permute_indices_with_cache(
370	                    self._cache_permute_indices,
371	                    layer.w2_weight.data[i].view(torch.uint8),
372	                    epilogue_tile_m,
373	                )
374	                tmp_weights2 = (
375	                    layer.w2_weight.data[i]
376	                    .clone()
377	                    .view(torch.uint8)[permute_indices.to(layer.w2_weight.data.device)]
378	                    .contiguous()
379	                )
380	
381	                tmp_weights1 = convert_to_block_layout(
382	                    tmp_weights1.view(torch.uint8), block_k
383	                )
384	                tmp_weights2 = convert_to_block_layout(
385	                    tmp_weights2.view(torch.uint8), block_k
386	                )
387	
388	                new_shape_w13 = tmp_weights1.view(torch.bfloat16).shape
389	                new_shape_w2 = tmp_weights2.view(torch.bfloat16).shape
390	                layer.w13_weight.data[i] = (
391	                    tmp_weights1.view(torch.bfloat16)
392	                    .contiguous()
393	                    .reshape(old_shape_w13)
394	                )
395	                layer.w2_weight.data[i] = (
396	                    tmp_weights2.view(torch.bfloat16).contiguous().reshape(old_shape_w2)
397	                )
398	
399	            layer.w13_weight.data = layer.w13_weight.data.reshape(
400	                layer.num_local_experts, *new_shape_w13
401	            )
402	            layer.w2_weight.data = layer.w2_weight.data.reshape(
403	                layer.num_local_experts, *new_shape_w2
404	            )
405	        if _is_npu:
406	            for weight_name in ["w13_weight", "w2_weight"]:
407	                weight = getattr(layer, weight_name)
408	                weight.data = npu_format_cast(weight)
409	
410	        return
411	
412	    def maybe_restore_flashinfer_trtllm_bf16_weight_shape_for_load(
413	        self,
414	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
415	        param: torch.nn.Parameter,
416	        weight_name: str,
417	    ) -> None:
418	        """Restore canonical BF16 MoE load shapes before hot weight copy.
419	
420	        The flashinfer TRT-LLM BF16 postprocess reshapes expert weights into
421	        block layout. During weight update, checkpoint tensors are in
422	        canonical layout and need a temporary shape restore for copy.
423	        """
424	        if not get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed():
425	            return
426	
427	        expected_shape = None
428	        if weight_name.endswith(".experts.w13_weight"):
429	            w13_rows = (
430	                2 * layer.intermediate_size_per_partition
431	                if layer.moe_runner_config.is_gated
432	                else layer.intermediate_size_per_partition
433	            )
434	            expected_shape = (layer.num_local_experts, w13_rows, layer.hidden_size)
435	        elif weight_name.endswith(".experts.w2_weight"):
436	            expected_shape = (
437	                layer.num_local_experts,
438	                layer.hidden_size,
439	                layer.intermediate_size_per_partition,
440	            )
441	
442	        if expected_shape is None or tuple(param.data.shape) == expected_shape:
443	            return
444	
445	        expected_numel = expected_shape[0] * expected_shape[1] * expected_shape[2]
446	        if param.data.numel() != expected_numel:
447	            raise RuntimeError(
448	                f"Cannot restore flashinfer TRT-LLM BF16 MoE weight shape for {weight_name}: "
449	                f"current shape={tuple(param.data.shape)}, expected shape={expected_shape}."
450	            )
451	
452	        param.data = param.data.reshape(expected_shape)
453	
454	    def _aiter_ck_moe_supported(self, layer) -> bool:
455	        # aiter CK fused-MoE requires intermediate_size_per_partition to be 128-aligned
456	        # (GemmSpec=Default; otherwise CK raises "not support this GEMM problem").
457	        return layer.intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 == 0
458	
459	    def create_moe_runner(
460	        self, layer: torch.nn.Module, moe_runner_config: MoeRunnerConfig
461	    ):
462	        self.moe_runner_config = moe_runner_config
463	        if self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe:
464	            backend = (
465	                MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_TRTLLM_ROUTED
466	                if get_moe_runner_backend().is_flashinfer_trtllm_routed()
467	                else MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_TRTLLM
468	            )
469	        elif self.use_flashinfer_cutlass:
470	            import sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_cutlass  # noqa: F401
471	
472	            backend = MoeRunnerBackend.FLASHINFER_CUTLASS
473	        elif self.use_deep_gemm:
474	            backend = MoeRunnerBackend.DEEP_GEMM
475	        elif self.use_triton_kernels:
476	            backend = MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON_KERNELS
477	        else:
478	            backend = MoeRunnerBackend.TRITON
479	        self.runner = MoeRunner(backend, moe_runner_config)
480	
481	        # aiter CK fused-MoE only supports 128-aligned shapes; otherwise use triton.
482	        self._aiter_runner: Optional[MoeRunner] = None
483	        if (
484	            _use_aiter
485	            and (
486	                get_moe_runner_backend().is_auto()
487	                or get_moe_runner_backend().is_aiter()
488	            )
489	            and get_moe_a2a_backend().supports_aiter()
490	        ):
491	            if self._aiter_ck_moe_supported(layer):
492	                self._aiter_runner = MoeRunner(
493	                    MoeRunnerBackend.AITER, moe_runner_config
494	                )
495	            elif get_moe_runner_backend().is_aiter():
496	                raise ValueError(
497	                    "moe_runner_backend=aiter is not supported for "
498	                    f"intermediate_size_per_partition={layer.intermediate_size_per_partition}; "
499	                    "use --moe-runner-backend triton."
500	                )
501	            else:
502	                logger.warning_once(
503	                    "aiter CK fused-MoE does not support "
504	                    f"intermediate_size_per_partition={layer.intermediate_size_per_partition}; "
505	                    "using triton MoE runner."
506	                )
507	
508	    @property
509	    def load_up_proj_weight_first(self) -> bool:
510	        # FlashInfer CUTLASS kernel assumes [Up, Gate] Proj as W13
511	        return self.use_flashinfer_cutlass
512	
513	    def apply(
514	        self,
515	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
516	        dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
517	    ) -> CombineInput:
518	        return self.forward(
519	            layer=layer,
520	            dispatch_output=dispatch_output,
521	        )
522	
523	    def forward_cuda(
524	        self,
525	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
526	        dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
527	    ) -> CombineInput:
528	        x = dispatch_output.hidden_states
529	
530	        backend = self.runner.runner_backend
531	        if backend.is_triton_kernels():
532	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.triton_kernels import (
533	                TritonKernelsQuantInfo,
534	            )
535	
536	            quant_info = TritonKernelsQuantInfo(
537	                w13_weight=layer.w13_weight,
538	                w2_weight=layer.w2_weight,
539	                w13_bias=getattr(layer, "w13_weight_bias", None),
540	                w2_bias=getattr(layer, "w2_weight_bias", None),
541	            )
542	            return self.runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
543	        elif self.runner.runner_backend.is_deep_gemm():
544	            w13_weight = layer.w13_weight
545	            w2_weight = layer.w2_weight
546	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.deep_gemm import DeepGemmMoeQuantInfo
547	
548	            # Only use_fp8=False when SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH is true,
549	            # otherwise use_fp8=True for FP8 dispatch path
550	            use_fp8 = not envs.SGLANG_DEEPEP_BF16_DISPATCH.get()
551	            quant_info = DeepGemmMoeQuantInfo(
552	                w13_weight=w13_weight,
553	                w2_weight=w2_weight,
554	                use_fp8=use_fp8,
555	            )
556	            return self.runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
557	        elif self.use_flashinfer_cutlass:
558	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_cutlass import (
559	                FlashInferCutlassMoeQuantInfo,
560	            )
561	
562	            quant_info = FlashInferCutlassMoeQuantInfo(
563	                quant_type="bf16",
564	                w13_weight=layer.w13_weight,
565	                w2_weight=layer.w2_weight,
566	                output_dtype=x.dtype,
567	                moe_ep_size=layer.moe_ep_size,
568	                moe_ep_rank=layer.moe_ep_rank,
569	                moe_tp_size=layer.moe_tp_size,
570	                moe_tp_rank=layer.moe_tp_rank,
571	                apply_routed_scaling_factor=not layer.should_fuse_routed_scaling_factor_in_topk,
572	            )
573	            return self.runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
574	        elif self.use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe:
575	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.flashinfer_trtllm import (
576	                FlashInferTrtllmBf16MoeQuantInfo,
577	            )
578	
579	            quant_info = FlashInferTrtllmBf16MoeQuantInfo(
580	                gemm1_weights=layer.w13_weight,
581	                gemm2_weights=layer.w2_weight,
582	                global_num_experts=layer.num_experts,
583	                local_expert_offset=layer.moe_ep_rank * layer.num_local_experts,
584	            )
585	            return self.runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
586	        else:
587	            if self._aiter_runner is not None:
588	                from sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.aiter import (
589	                    AiterMoeQuantInfo,
590	                )
591	
592	                quant_info = AiterMoeQuantInfo(
593	                    w13_weight=layer.w13_weight,
594	                    w2_weight=layer.w2_weight,
595	                    expert_mask=layer.dispatcher.expert_mask_gpu,
596	                )
597	                return self._aiter_runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
598	
599	            quant_info = TritonMoeQuantInfo(
600	                w13_weight=layer.w13_weight,
601	                w2_weight=layer.w2_weight,
602	                b13=getattr(layer, "w13_weight_bias", None),
603	                b2=getattr(layer, "w2_weight_bias", None),
604	            )
605	            return self.runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
606	
607	    def forward_cpu(
608	        self,
609	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
610	        dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
611	    ) -> CombineInput:
612	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher import StandardCombineInput
613	
614	        x = dispatch_output.hidden_states
615	        topk_output = dispatch_output.topk_output
616	
617	        moe_runner_config = self.moe_runner_config
618	
619	        assert (
620	            moe_runner_config.activation == "silu"
621	        ), f"activation = {moe_runner_config.activation} is not supported."
622	
623	        if use_intel_amx_backend(layer):
624	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.topk import apply_topk_weights_cpu
625	
626	            topk_weights, topk_ids, _ = topk_output
627	            x, topk_weights = apply_topk_weights_cpu(
628	                moe_runner_config.apply_router_weight_on_input, topk_weights, x
629	            )
630	            output = torch.ops.sgl_kernel.fused_experts_cpu(
631	                x,
632	                layer.w13_weight,
633	                layer.w2_weight,
634	                topk_weights,
635	                topk_ids,
636	                False,  # inplace # See [Note] inplace should be False in fused_experts.
637	                CPUQuantMethod.UNQUANT,
638	                None,  # w1_scale
639	                None,  # w2_scale
640	                None,  # w1_zp
641	                None,  # w2_zp
642	                None,  # block_size
643	                getattr(layer, "w13_weight_bias", None),
644	                getattr(layer, "w2_weight_bias", None),
645	                layer.moe_runner_config.gemm1_alpha,
646	                layer.moe_runner_config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
647	                True,  # is_vnni
648	            )
649	            return StandardCombineInput(hidden_states=output)
650	        else:
651	            from sglang.srt.layers.moe.fused_moe_native import moe_forward_native
652	
653	            output = moe_forward_native(
654	                layer,
655	                x,
656	                topk_output,
657	                moe_runner_config,
658	            )
659	            return StandardCombineInput(hidden_states=output)
660	
661	    def get_triton_quant_info(self, layer: torch.nn.Module) -> TritonMoeQuantInfo:
662	        return TritonMoeQuantInfo(
663	            w13_weight=layer.w13_weight,
664	            w2_weight=layer.w2_weight,
665	            b13=getattr(layer, "w13_weight_bias", None),
666	            b2=getattr(layer, "w2_weight_bias", None),
667	        )
668	
669	    def forward_xpu(
670	        self,
671	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
672	        dispatch_output: StandardDispatchOutput,
673	    ) -> CombineInput:
674	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher import StandardCombineInput
675	
676	        x = dispatch_output.hidden_states
677	        topk_output = dispatch_output.topk_output
678	
679	        moe_runner_config = self.moe_runner_config
680	        assert moe_runner_config.activation in [
681	            "silu",
682	            "gelu",
683	            "relu2",  # Nemotron-H (NemotronHForCausalLM) uses squared-ReLU.
684	        ], f"activation = {moe_runner_config.activation} is not supported."
685	
686	        backend = self.runner.runner_backend
687	        if use_intel_xpu_backend():
688	            # sgl-kernel-xpu path
689	            from sgl_kernel import fused_experts
690	
691	            topk_weights, topk_ids, _ = topk_output
692	            if moe_runner_config.apply_router_weight_on_input:
693	                x = x * topk_weights.to(x.dtype)
694	                topk_weights = torch.ones_like(topk_weights)
695	            output = fused_experts(
696	                x,
697	                layer.w13_weight,
698	                layer.w2_weight,
699	                topk_weights,
700	                topk_ids,
701	                b1=getattr(layer, "w13_weight_bias", None),
702	                b2=getattr(layer, "w2_weight_bias", None),
703	                activation=moe_runner_config.activation,
704	                gemm1_alpha=moe_runner_config.gemm1_alpha,
705	                gemm1_limit=moe_runner_config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
706	            )
707	            return StandardCombineInput(hidden_states=output)
708	        else:
709	            assert backend.is_triton()
710	            assert (
711	                moe_runner_config.activation == "silu"
712	            ), f"activation = {moe_runner_config.activation} is not supported \
713	            for Triton PATH, please set ENV SGLANG_USE_SGL_XPU=1."
714	
715	            quant_info = self.get_triton_quant_info(layer)
716	            return self.runner.run(dispatch_output, quant_info)
717	
718	    def forward_npu(
719	        self,
720	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
721	        dispatch_output: DispatchOutput,
722	    ) -> CombineInput:
723	
724	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher import StandardCombineInput
725	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.base import DispatchOutputChecker
726	
727	        if DispatchOutputChecker.format_is_deepep(dispatch_output):
728	            return self._forward_npu_deepep(layer, dispatch_output)
729	
730	        # x.shape = [B*S, H]
731	        x = dispatch_output.hidden_states
732	        # topk_weights.shape = [B*S, K]; topk_ids.shape = [B*S, K]
733	        topk_weights, topk_ids, _ = dispatch_output.topk_output
734	
735	        original_dtype = x.dtype
736	        num_tokens = x.shape[0]
737	        topk_weights = topk_weights.to(x.dtype)
738	        topk_ids = topk_ids.to(torch.int32)
739	        num_experts = layer.num_experts
740	        top_k = layer.top_k or topk_ids.shape[1]  # in case layer.top_k is not set
741	
742	        hidden_states, expanded_row_idx, expert_tokens, _ = (
743	            torch.ops.npu.npu_moe_init_routing_v2(
744	                x,
745	                topk_ids,
746	                active_num=num_tokens * top_k,
747	                expert_num=num_experts,
748	                expert_tokens_num_type=1,
749	                expert_tokens_num_flag=True,
750	                active_expert_range=[0, num_experts],
751	                quant_mode=-1,
752	            )
753	        )
754	        expert_tokens = expert_tokens.to(torch.int64)
755	        w13_bias = [layer.w13_weight_bias] if self.with_bias else None
756	        w2_bias = [layer.w2_weight_bias] if self.with_bias else None
757	
758	        # gmm1: gate_up_proj
759	        hidden_states = torch.ops.npu.npu_grouped_matmul(
760	            x=[hidden_states],
761	            weight=[layer.w13_weight.transpose(1, 2)],
762	            bias=w13_bias,
763	            split_item=2,
764	            group_list_type=1,
765	            group_type=0,
766	            group_list=expert_tokens,
767	            output_dtype=original_dtype,
768	        )[0]
769	
770	        # act_fn:
771	        if self.moe_runner_config.activation == "npu_swiglu_oai":
772	            from sgl_kernel_npu.activation.swiglu_oai import swiglu_oai
773	
774	            hidden_states = swiglu_oai(layer, hidden_states)
775	        elif self.moe_runner_config.activation == "silu":
776	            if self.moe_runner_config.gemm1_clamp_limit is not None:
777	                from sgl_kernel_npu.activation.swiglu_quant import swiglu_quant
778	
779	                hidden_states, _ = swiglu_quant(
780	                    hidden_states,
781	                    group_list=expert_tokens,
782	                    group_list_type=1,
783	                    need_quant=False,
784	                    do_limit=True,
785	                    limit=self.moe_runner_config.gemm1_clamp_limit,
786	                )
787	            else:
788	                hidden_states = torch.ops.npu.npu_swiglu(hidden_states)
789	        else:
790	            from sglang.srt.layers.activation import GeluAndMul
791	
792	            hidden_states = GeluAndMul()(hidden_states)
793	
794	        # gmm2: down_proj
795	        hidden_states = torch.ops.npu.npu_grouped_matmul(
796	            x=[hidden_states],
797	            weight=[layer.w2_weight.transpose(1, 2)],
798	            bias=w2_bias,
799	            split_item=2,
800	            group_list_type=1,
801	            group_type=0,
802	            group_list=expert_tokens,
803	            output_dtype=original_dtype,
804	        )[0]
805	
806	        final_hidden_states = torch.ops.npu.npu_moe_finalize_routing(
807	            hidden_states,
808	            skip1=None,
809	            skip2=None,
810	            bias=None,
811	            scales=topk_weights,
812	            expanded_src_to_dst_row=expanded_row_idx,
813	            export_for_source_row=topk_ids,
814	            drop_pad_mode=2,
815	        )
816	
817	        return StandardCombineInput(hidden_states=final_hidden_states)
818	
819	    def _forward_npu_deepep(
820	        self,
821	        layer: torch.nn.Module,
822	        dispatch_output: DispatchOutput,
823	    ) -> CombineInput:
824	        from sglang.srt.hardware_backend.npu.quantization.fused_moe_method_npu import (
825	            npu_fused_moe_without_routing_weights_bf16,
826	        )
827	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher import (
828	            DeepEPLLCombineInput,
829	            DeepEPNormalCombineInput,
830	        )
831	        from sglang.srt.layers.moe.token_dispatcher.base import DispatchOutputChecker
832	
833	        # NOTE: Ascend's Dispatch & Combine does not support FP16
834	        output_dtype = torch.bfloat16
835	        group_list_type = 1
836	
837	        if DispatchOutputChecker.format_is_deepep_normal(dispatch_output):
838	            hidden_states, _, _, _, num_recv_tokens_per_expert = dispatch_output
839	            group_list = torch.tensor(
840	                num_recv_tokens_per_expert,
841	                dtype=torch.int64,
842	                device=hidden_states.device,
843	            )
844	            combine_cls = DeepEPNormalCombineInput
845	        else:
846	            hidden_states, _, _, _, group_list, _ = dispatch_output
847	            group_list = group_list.to(torch.int64)
848	            combine_cls = DeepEPLLCombineInput
849	
850	        hidden_states = npu_fused_moe_without_routing_weights_bf16(
851	            layer, hidden_states, group_list_type, group_list, output_dtype
852	        )
853	        return combine_cls(
854	            hidden_states=hidden_states,
855	            topk_ids=dispatch_output.topk_ids,
856	            topk_weights=dispatch_output.topk_weights,
857	        )
858	
859	    def forward_tpu(self, *args, **kwargs) -> CombineInput:
860	        raise NotImplementedError("The TPU backend currently does not support MoE.")
861	
862	    def forward_musa(self, *args, **kwargs) -> CombineInput:
863	        return self.forward_cuda(*args, **kwargs)
864	
865	    forward_native = forward_cpu
866

content.text:
Now I have a thorough understanding of the entire MoE execution stack. Let me compile my findings.

---

Here is a comprehensive report on MoE (Mixture of Experts) execution configuration in the sglang source tree:

## 1. MoE Runner Selection Logic

### Available Backends (`MoeRunnerBackend` enum)
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/utils.py` (lines 86-144)

The `MoeRunnerBackend` enum defines these backends:
- `AUTO` -- resolved at runtime based on hardware, model, and quantization
- `DEEP_GEMM` -- DeepGEMM (NVIDIA, used with DeepEP for DS-V3 style models)
- `TRITON` -- Triton-based fused MoE kernels (general fallback)
- `TRITON_KERNELS` -- vllm-style triton_kernels package (GPT-OSS models)
- `FLASHINFER_TRTLLM` -- FlashInfer TRT-LLM MoE kernels (NVIDIA SM100+)
- `EXPERIMENTAL_SGL_TRTLLM` -- experimental SGL TRT-LLM variant
- `FLASHINFER_TRTLLM_ROUTED` -- FlashInfer TRT-LLM routed variant
- `FLASHINFER_CUTLASS` -- FlashInfer CUTLASS MoE
- `FLASHINFER_MXFP4` -- FlashInfer MXFP4 MoE
- `FLASHINFER_CUTEDSL` -- FlashInfer CuteDSL MoE
- `CUTLASS` -- direct CUTLASS path
- `MARLIN` -- Marlin quantized MoE
- `AITER` -- AMD AITER (ROCm-specific, using CK/ASM kernels)

### Runner Instantiation
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/runner.py` (lines 27-71)

The `MoeRunner.__init__` dispatches to the appropriate `MoeRunnerCore`:
- `TritonRunnerCore` for `TRITON`
- `TritonKernelsRunnerCore` for `TRITON_KERNELS`
- `DeepGemmRunnerCore` for `DEEP_GEMM`
- `AiterRunnerCore` for `AITER` (lazy-imported from `sglang.srt.layers.moe.moe_runner.aiter`)
- `None` (fused-path only) for `MARLIN`, `FLASHINFER_TRTLLM`, `FLASHINFER_CUTEDSL`, `FLASHINFER_CUTLASS`, `FLASHINFER_MXFP4`, `CUTLASS`

### AUTO Resolution -- Unquantized (BF16) Models
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/unquant.py`, `create_moe_runner` (lines 459-506)

For unquantized MoE layers, when `moe_runner_backend == AUTO`:
1. If `use_flashinfer_trtllm_moe` is set -> use the appropriate FlashInfer TRT-LLM variant
2. If `use_flashinfer_cutlass` -> `FLASHINFER_CUTLASS`
3. If `use_deep_gemm` -> `DEEP_GEMM`
4. If `use_triton_kernels` -> `TRITON_KERNELS`
5. Otherwise -> `TRITON`

A separate `_aiter_runner` is created **alongside** the main runner when:
- `SGLANG_USE_AITER=1` is set AND on HIP (ROCm)
- The backend is `AUTO` or explicitly `AITER`
- The A2A backend supports AITER
- `intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 == 0` (128-alignment required by AITER CK kernels)

At forward time (line 587), if `_aiter_runner` is not None, it is used **instead of** the main triton runner. This is the key AMD fallback: on ROCm with AITER enabled, unquantized models prefer AITER but fall back to Triton if the dimensions are not 128-aligned.

### AUTO Resolution -- FP8 Quantized Models
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/fp8.py`, `create_moe_runner` (lines 1859-1887)

For FP8 MoE, when `moe_runner_backend == AUTO`:
1. If `is_deepgemm_moe_runner_backend_enabled()` -> `DEEP_GEMM` (requires JIT DeepGEMM + DeepEP/Mooncake/Nixl A2A)
2. **If `_is_hip` AND (`_use_aiter` OR `_use_hip_int4`) AND the A2A backend supports AITER -> `AITER`** -- this is where AMD/ROCm gets its preferred backend
3. Otherwise -> `TRITON`

The static method `is_deepgemm_moe_runner_backend_enabled()` (lines 948-963) checks for NVIDIA DeepGEMM + DeepEP-family backends -- this path is never taken on AMD.

## 2. AMD/ROCm-Specific References in MoE Code

### AITER Runner
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/aiter.py`

This is the AMD-exclusive MoE runner. It wraps the `aiter.fused_moe.fused_moe` function from ROCm's AITER library (Composable Kernel / ASM-based kernels). It supports:
- Unquantized BF16 (`AiterQuantType.NONE`)
- FP8 per-token (`AiterQuantType.PER_TOKEN`)
- FP8 per-block-128x128 (`AiterQuantType.PER_128X128`)
- MXFP4/W4A4 per-1x32 (`AiterQuantType.PER_1X32`)

### ROCm MoE Utilities
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/rocm_moe_utils.py`

Contains AMD-specific functions:
- `rocm_aiter_asm_moe_tkw1` -- wraps AITER's `asm_moe_tkw1` (assembly MoE top-k=1) kernel
- `rocm_fused_experts_tkw1` -- entry point for FP8 per-channel quantized MoE with `apply_router_weight_on_input`
- `upscale` / `upscale_mxfp4` -- Triton kernels for dequantizing FP8/MXFP4 dispatched hidden states back to BF16 (used by MoriEP dispatcher on ROCm)

### MXFP8 MoE for AMD gfx95 (CDNA4)
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/triton_utils/mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95.py`

A native MXFP8 MoE implementation for AMD CDNA4 (gfx950, i.e., MI350) using Triton's `tl.dot_scaled` instruction. This provides grouped GEMM with MXFP8 (1x32 block, E8M0 scale) precision. It is specifically invoked from the `TritonRunnerCore.run()` method (in `moe_runner/triton.py`, line 86):

```python
if quant_info.use_mxfp8 and is_hip() and is_gfx95_supported():
    from ...triton_utils.mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95 import fused_experts_mxfp8
```

This is a gfx950-specific optimization that would not be used on gfx942 (MI300).

### gfx95 / gfx942 Detection
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/utils/common.py` (lines 1015-1034)

- `is_gfx95_supported()` -- returns True if `torch.version.hip` is set and `gcnArchName` contains "gfx95" (MI350 / CDNA4)
- `is_gfx942_supported()` -- returns True for "gfx942" (MI300X / MI325X / CDNA3)
- `_is_shuffle_moe_mxfp4 = is_gfx95_supported()` (in fp8.py, line 118) -- gates MXFP4 shuffle on gfx95

### Configuration File for gfx950 MoE
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/triton_utils/configs/minimax_m3_gfx950_mxfp8_compact_moe.json`

A tuning config JSON for the MiniMax-M3 model's MXFP8 MoE on gfx950.

### Key Environment Variables (AMD/ROCm MoE)
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/environ.py`

- `SGLANG_USE_AITER` (default: False) -- master switch to enable AITER kernels on ROCm
- `SGLANG_USE_AITER_FP8_PER_TOKEN` (default: False) -- use per-token FP8 quantization with AITER
- `SGLANG_USE_AITER_MOE_GU_ITLV` (default: True) -- gate/up weight layout mode (INTERLEAVE vs SEPARATED) for AITER MoE
- `SGLANG_INT4_WEIGHT` (default: False) -- enable INT4 weight packing on HIP (INT4 MoE weight, FP8 compute)

## 3. How gemma-4-26B Maps to MoE Execution Paths

### Model Architecture
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/models/gemma4_causal.py`

The `Gemma4DecoderLayer` conditionally includes MoE when `config.enable_moe_block == True` (line 606). When MoE is enabled:

1. A `Gemma4Router` (lines 131-186) preprocesses input with RMSNorm + learned scale, then projects to expert logits
2. A `Gemma4MoE` (lines 189-276) wraps the MoE dispatch, using:
   - Custom routing: softmax over all experts, then top-k, then renormalize. Per-expert output scales are folded into routing weights
   - `activation="gelu"` (NOT silu -- this is important for backend compatibility)
   - `get_moe_impl_class(quant_config)` to determine the MoE implementation (returns `FusedMoE` for standard backends)

### Backend Selection for Gemma4
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/arg_groups/overrides.py`, `_gemma4_overrides` (lines 604-630)

The override handler for Gemma4 (`Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration`, `Gemma4ForCausalLM`, `Gemma4UnifiedForConditionalGeneration`) does:
- Sets attention backend to `trtllm_mha` on SM100 (Blackwell), `triton` otherwise
- On SM100 with `modelopt_fp4` quantization: sets `moe_runner_backend = "flashinfer_trtllm"`
- **No Gemma4-specific override for AMD** -- on AMD/ROCm, Gemma4 falls through to the generic auto resolution

### Resolution Path for Gemma4 on AMD/ROCm

Since Gemma4 has no AMD-specific overrides, the `moe_runner_backend` stays `"auto"` and resolves as follows:

1. **Unquantized (BF16):** In `UnquantizedFusedMoEMethod.create_moe_runner`, the main runner becomes `TRITON`. If `SGLANG_USE_AITER=1`, a separate `_aiter_runner` is created (if `intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 == 0`). At forward time, the AITER runner is preferred when available.

2. **FP8 quantized:** In `Fp8MoEMethod.create_moe_runner`, on `_is_hip` with `_use_aiter`, the backend resolves directly to `AITER`.

**Important note:** Gemma4 uses `activation="gelu"` for its MoE experts. The AITER runner maps this to `ActivationType.Gelu` (line 100 of `aiter.py`). The native MXFP8 gfx95 path (`mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95.py`) only supports `activation="silu"` with gated SwiGLU (line 388-391), so it would **not** be used for Gemma4's GELU activation on MI350.

## 4. Fallback Logic Where a Faster Backend is Skipped on AMD

### Fallback 1: DeepGEMM Skipped on AMD
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/fp8.py`, lines 1865-1875

DeepGEMM is only enabled when `is_deepgemm_moe_runner_backend_enabled()` returns True, which requires `deep_gemm_wrapper.ENABLE_JIT_DEEPGEMM` -- an NVIDIA-only capability. On AMD, this check always fails, so DeepGEMM is never selected. The code falls through to AITER (if enabled) or TRITON.

### Fallback 2: FlashInfer TRT-LLM Backends Skipped on AMD
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/arg_groups/overrides.py`

The `flashinfer_trtllm`, `flashinfer_trtllm_routed`, `flashinfer_cutlass`, and `flashinfer_cutedsl` backends are only auto-selected when `is_sm100_supported()` or `is_sm90_supported()` -- NVIDIA-only checks. They are never auto-selected on AMD.

### Fallback 3: AITER CK Dimension Alignment
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/unquant.py`, lines 454-506

The `_aiter_ck_moe_supported` method (line 454) checks `layer.intermediate_size_per_partition % 128 == 0`. If this fails:
- When backend is explicitly `AITER` -> raises ValueError
- When backend is `AUTO` -> logs a warning and falls back to the Triton MoE runner
This is the primary "faster backend skipped on AMD" pattern: AITER (CK/ASM kernels) is faster but has stricter alignment requirements.

### Fallback 4: GPT-OSS BF16 on ROCm with AITER
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/arg_groups/overrides.py`, lines 539-544

For GPT-OSS models on ROCm with AITER enabled, the override explicitly forces `moe_runner_backend = "triton"` with the comment: "aiter CK kernel doesn't support all GEMM dimensions." This is an explicit skip of the faster AITER backend for GPT-OSS BF16 on AMD.

### Fallback 5: BF16 DeepEP Low-Latency on AMD Skipped
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/unquant.py`, lines 329-338

The DeepGEMM BF16 path with DeepEP low-latency quant config is explicitly skipped when `_is_hip` is True:
```python
if (self.use_deep_gemm and layer.w13_weight.dtype == torch.bfloat16
    and get_moe_a2a_backend().is_deepep()
    and get_deepep_mode().enable_low_latency()
    and not _is_npu
    and not _is_hip  # <-- AMD skipped
    and hasattr(layer, "dispatcher")):
```

### Fallback 6: FP8 Weight Shuffling on gfx95
**File:** `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/fp8.py`, lines 632-638

The `_use_aiter_bpreshuffle_gfx95` flag enables optimized block-preshuffle FP8 linear on CDNA4 (gfx950). When `use_aiter_triton_gemm_w8a8_tuned_gfx950()` returns False for a particular (N, K) shape, the code falls back from AITER to a non-AITER Triton path, with the comment "drops as use_aiter_triton_gemm_w8a8_tuned_gfx950() expands."

## Summary of Key Files

| Purpose | File Path |
|---------|-----------|
| MoE backend enum + globals | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/utils.py` |
| MoE runner dispatcher | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/runner.py` |
| Runner base classes + registries | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/base.py` |
| AITER runner (AMD) | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/aiter.py` |
| Triton runner | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/triton.py` |
| AMD MXFP8 native MoE (gfx950) | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/triton_utils/mxfp8_moe_amd_gfx95.py` |
| AMD ROCm MoE utilities | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/rocm_moe_utils.py` |
| Unquantized MoE method + AMD fallback | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/unquant.py` |
| FP8 MoE method + AMD auto-resolution | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/quantization/fp8.py` |
| Gemma4 model (MoE integration) | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/models/gemma4_causal.py` |
| Gemma4 overrides | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/arg_groups/overrides.py` (lines 604-630) |
| Model-specific backend overrides | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/arg_groups/overrides.py` |
| FusedMoE layer (main orchestrator) | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/fused_moe_triton/layer.py` |
| MoE impl class selector | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/ep_moe/layer.py` (line 271) |
| gfx95/gfx942 detection | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/utils/common.py` (lines 1015-1034) |
| ROCm platform definition | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/platforms/rocm.py` |
| Environment variables | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/environ.py` |
| gfx950 MoE tuning config | `/sgl-workspace/sglang/python/sglang/srt/layers/moe/moe_runner/triton_utils/configs/minimax_m3_gfx950_mxfp8_compact_moe.json` |
